dialogue.answerText: You're in the middle of a dream. My dream, technically. Welcome to the ant farm. You'll be digging for honey pots and, probably, getting bitten a few times.You're in the middle of a dream. My dream, technically. Welcome to the ant farm. You'll be digging for honey pots and, probably, getting bitten a few times.
Honey pots are replete ants — they swell up with nectar until they're basically living storage units. The goal is to find them without getting stung.
Just click around, you'll figure it out.

dialogue.questionText: What happens if I get bitten?
dialogue.answerText: Bitten ants inject a mild venom. It gets you stoned, in a good way. But if you get bitten three times in one day, you'll pass out and wake up tomorrow. No big deal.
Yeah — one replete per row, one per column. Start with safe guesses. Don't be afraid to fail. Failing's the doorway in.
